ddt:Target.Name: BSG_V2.4
ddt:Target.Description:
**** HISTORY ****
V1.0: [Sheela Hariharan, RNTBCI] Creation of intial version
V1.1 [Sheela Hariharan, RNTBCI] Screen addition for all DIDs, Routines and IO
V1.2 [Sheela Hariharan, RNTBCI] Corrected the screens and database errors
V2.0 [MUNIRATHINAM Suresh-babu,RNBTCI]
Database prepared based on Ref[17] v1.5 document .
V2.1 [Marcos Felipe CARVALHO BARRETO, TCR] Base V2.0 with addition of HHN project.
V2.2 [Marcos Felipe CARVALHO BARRETO, TCR]
DID offset correction (WKUP_STATE, Fault flags). DIDs F1.8A, F1.94 and F1.95 : Lengt correction with auto-ident. DTC "Bus of" name update. Correction of previous database errors. Database update on REF[17] v1.9 document.
V2.3 [Marcos Felipe CARVALHO BARRETO, TCR] Correction of "Unkown DTC : ##C07A##". Removal of xJA/xJF. Update of SW Version auto ident : C0 V3 Build 3 : 42B6 0B000E03 C0 V3 Build 5 : 42B6 0B000F01
V3.0 [Marcos Felipe CARVALHO BARRETO, TCR]: Database auto-ident modification for SW 3.7 ( 42_B6_0C_01_01_XX ) + !NEW Configuration DID coding! No more compatible with previous versions! Central Scrip V 1.11 : ASCII forbiden caracters on data were updated.
V3.2 [TCR,RTK]: Update of DIDs snapshot according to DID size.
V3.3.1[kidong.KIM, RTK] DID snapshot updated accroding to SW implementation
V2.4 : Database auto-ident modification for SW 3.6.6 - HHN Validation

Failures.Name: 10 DTC failures read with After sales Frames

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear
jump of 3 percent of idc max
jump of 12 percent of idc max
detected failure / Control board NTC failure
detected failure / Rotor excitation circuit failure
detected failure / Dmag Mosfet Short circuit
detected event / too high Network voltage
detected event / Network voltage too low
detected failure / Cranking and stalling mode failure
Temperature below or equal -40 degrees C
Temperature equal or above 213 degrees C
Temperature below or equal -40 degrees C
Temperature equal or above 213 degrees C
Temperature below or equal 0 degrees C
Temperature equal or above 253 degrees C
Temperature below or equal 0 degrees C
Temperature equal or above 253 degrees C
Temperature below or equal 0 degrees C
Temperature equal or above 253 degrees C

Data.Name: iStARS maximum voltage value from IG on
Data.Comment: iStARS maximum voltage value from IG on

Data.Name: iStARS minimum voltage value from IG on
Data.Comment: iStARS minimum voltage value from IG on

Data.Name: iStARS maximum current value from IG on
Data.Comment: iStARS maximum current value from IG on

Data.Name: iStARS minimum current value from IG on
Data.Comment: iStARS minimum current value from IG on

Item.Text: Rotor speed below or equal to -2000 rpm

Data.Name: USM_ReferenceVoltage_raw
Data.Comment: BFT_VOLTAGE : 12 volts voltage sent by USM

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ECUReset.keyoffon
Request.Comment: Key OFF / Key ON Reset of ECU

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.iStARS maximum voltage value from IG on

DataItem.Name: iStARS maximum voltage value from IG on

Request.Name: DataRead.iStARS minimum voltage value from IG on

DataItem.Name: iStARS minimum voltage value from IG on

Request.Name: DataRead.iStARS maximum current value from IG on

DataItem.Name: iStARS maximum current value from IG on

Request.Name: DataRead.iStARS minimum current value from IG on

DataItem.Name: iStARS minimum current value from IG on

Test.Description: Logical Block ID, Algorithm Based Failures
Logical Block ID, system internal failures/General memory failure
Logical Block ID, Programming failure/Not programmed

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account

Button.Text: Read Mileage of the last occurrence counter

Label.Text: Renault / Nissan vehicle (remote diag) / BFT threshold
!NEW Configuration DID coding! Not compatible with SW 3.6.6 version or older versions!

Button.Text: WRITE C1A HS / C1A message set
WRITE Renault / Nissan vehicle (remote diag) / BFT threshold
READ C1A HS / C1A message set
READ Renault / Nissan vehicle (remote diag) / BFT threshold

Label.Text: iStARS minimum voltage value from IG on
iStARS maximum current value from IG on
iStARS minimum current value from IG on
iStARS maximum voltage value from IG on

Button.Text: READ iStARS maximum voltage value from IG on

Button.Text: READ Excitation current internal target value

Send.RequestName: DataRead.iStARS maximum voltage value from IG on
DataRead.iStARS minimum voltage value from IG on
DataRead.iStARS maximum current value from IG on
DataRead.iStARS minimum current value from IG on

Button.Text: READ iStARS output current actual value
